## Validation performed

- [ ] `npm ci`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Existing tests pass, where a test suite exists
- [ ] Additional validation described below

Validation evidence:

## Documentation and evidence

- [ ] Required documentation is updated
- [ ] Decisions are recorded where required
- [ ] Screenshots or visual evidence are attached for UI changes
- [ ] Responsive and accessibility evidence is included for UI changes
- [ ] Not applicable items are explained

## Risks and known limitations

<!-- Include accepted risk, follow-up work, compatibility concerns, and rollback notes. -->

## Reviewer checklist

- [ ] The change is linked to an approved governing artifact
- [ ] The diff stays within approved scope
- [ ] Architecture and design authority are respected
- [ ] Security, privacy, data, and integration impacts are addressed
- [ ] Validation evidence is sufficient and CI passes
- [ ] Documentation and decision records are complete
- [ ] No secrets, generated output, or unrelated dependency changes are included
- [ ] The selected merge method follows Atlas governance
